arguments.argument: if instance_exists(ownerID) { draw_set_blend_mode(bm_add) draw_sprite_ext(sprite_index,image_index,ownerID.x+xOffset,ownerID.y+yOffset,image_xscale,image_yscale,image_angle,image_blend,image_alpha) draw_set_blend_mode(bm_normal) draw_sprite(sPauseM_AtkTypes,atkType,ownerID.x+xOffset-12,ownerID.y+yOffset-8) if atkUp=1 draw_sprite_ext(sPauseM_Cursor,0,ownerID.x+xOffset+12,ownerID.y+yOffset+2-arrowY,1,1,90,image_blend,image_alpha) else draw_sprite_ext(sPauseM_AbilArrow,0,ownerID.x+xOffset+12,ownerID.y+yOffset-2+arrowY,1,1,270,image_blend,image_alpha) }
